synopsis:
Darth Vader #23 is the twenty-third issue of the Marvel canon comic book series Star Wars: Darth Vader (2020)
An epic new story begins as DARTH VADER embarks upon a new mission in partnership with a sworn enemy – but who's leading whom to doom?  And what happens when the QUEEN'S SHADOW learns the deepest secret of the Dark Lord of the Sith? Plus: the shocking return of a face from Vader's most distant past!''
title: Darth Vader (2020) #23
